mapper.select: select id from portfolio_items where user_id = #{userId} and is_active = true order by updated_at desc, created_at desc, id desc limit 1

select pir.reason_code, pir.display_order from portfolio_item_reasons pir join portfolio_items pi on pi.id = pir.portfolio_item_id where pir.portfolio_item_id = #{portfolioItemId} and pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true order by pir.display_order asc, pir.id asc

select id, report_week, generated_at, headline, summary, changed_item_count, alert_item_count, positive_item_count, negative_item_count from portfolio_weekly_reports where user_id = #{userId} order by report_week desc, generated_at desc limit 1

select id, report_week, generated_at, headline, summary, changed_item_count, alert_item_count, positive_item_count, negative_item_count from portfolio_weekly_reports where user_id = #{userId} order by report_week desc, generated_at desc

select pwri.portfolio_item_id, pwri.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.logo_url, pwri.current_status, pwri.previous_status, pwri.score_delta, pwri.headline_label, pwri.change_type, pwri.summary from portfolio_weekly_report_items pwri join stocks s on s.id = pwri.stock_id where pwri.report_id = #{reportId} order by pwri.display_order asc, pwri.id asc

with active_items as ( select pi.id as portfolio_item_id, pi.stock_id, coalesce(s.name_ko, s.name_en) as company_name, s.ticker, s.logo_url from portfolio_items pi join stocks s on s.id = pi.stock_id where pi.user_id = #{userId} and pi.is_active = true ), trend_rows as ( select ai.portfolio_item_id, ai.stock_id, ai.company_name, ai.ticker, ai.logo_url, latest.recommendation_status, latest.engine_score, latest.news_score, latest.price_momentum_score, latest.price_stability_score, latest.fundamental_quality_score, 1 as row_number from active_items ai join lateral ( select r.* from recommendations r where r.portfolio_item_id = ai.portfolio_item_id order by r.recommendation_date desc, r.created_at desc limit 1 ) latest on true
union all
select ai.portfolio_item_id, ai.stock_id, ai.company_name, ai.ticker, ai.logo_url, baseline.recommendation_status, baseline.engine_score, baseline.news_score, baseline.price_momentum_score, baseline.price_stability_score, baseline.fundamental_quality_score, 2 as row_number from active_items ai join lateral ( select r.* from recommendations r where r.portfolio_item_id = ai.portfolio_item_id and r.recommendation_date <= ( select max(latest_date.recommendation_date) - 6 from recommendations latest_date where latest_date.portfolio_item_id = ai.portfolio_item_id ) order by r.recommendation_date desc, r.created_at desc limit 1 ) baseline on true ) select portfolio_item_id, stock_id, company_name, ticker, logo_url, recommendation_status, engine_score, news_score, price_momentum_score, price_stability_score, fundamental_quality_score, row_number from trend_rows order by portfolio_item_id asc, row_number asc
mapper.insert: insert into portfolio_weekly_reports ( user_id, report_week, generated_at, headline, summary, changed_item_count, alert_item_count, positive_item_count, negative_item_count ) values ( #{userId}, #{reportWeek}, #{generatedAt}, #{headline}, #{summary}, #{changedItemCount}, #{alertItemCount}, #{positiveItemCount}, #{negativeItemCount} ) on conflict (user_id, report_week) do update set generated_at = excluded.generated_at, headline = excluded.headline, summary = excluded.summary, changed_item_count = excluded.changed_item_count, alert_item_count = excluded.alert_item_count, positive_item_count = excluded.positive_item_count, negative_item_count = excluded.negative_item_count, updated_at = now()

insert into portfolio_weekly_report_items ( report_id, portfolio_item_id, stock_id, current_status, previous_status, score_delta, headline_label, change_type, summary, display_order ) values ( #{reportId}, #{portfolioItemId}, #{stockId}, #{currentStatus}, #{previousStatus}, #{scoreDelta}, #{headlineLabel}, #{changeType}, #{summary}, #{displayOrder} )

insert into user_alert_events ( user_id, portfolio_item_id, stock_id, alert_type, title, body, dedupe_key, sent_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{portfolioItemId}, #{stockId}, #{alertType}, #{title}, #{body}, #{dedupeKey}, #{sentAt} ) on conflict (dedupe_key) do nothing
mapper.select: select id, portfolio_item_id, stock_id, alert_type, title, body, sent_at, read_at, created_at from user_alert_events where user_id = #{userId} order by case when read_at is null then 0 else 1 end asc, created_at desc
select id, portfolio_item_id, stock_id, alert_type, title, body, sent_at, read_at, created_at from user_alert_events where user_id = #{userId} and id = #{alertId} limit 1
select id, portfolio_item_id, stock_id, alert_type, title, body, sent_at, read_at, created_at from user_alert_events where user_id = #{userId} and dedupe_key = #{dedupeKey} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_notification_preferences ( user_id, timezone, weekly_digest_day, weekly_digest_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{timezone}, #{weeklyDigestDay}, #{weeklyDigestTime} ) on conflict (user_id) do nothing
mapper.select: select id, user_id, instant_alert_enabled, weekly_digest_enabled, price_risk_alert_enabled, news_weakened_alert_enabled, status_changed_alert_enabled, quiet_hours_enabled, quiet_hours_start, quiet_hours_end, timezone, weekly_digest_day, weekly_digest_time, created_at, updated_at from user_notification_preferences where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.update: update user_notification_preferences set instant_alert_enabled = #{instantAlertEnabled}, weekly_digest_enabled = #{weeklyDigestEnabled}, price_risk_alert_enabled = #{priceRiskAlertEnabled}, news_weakened_alert_enabled = #{newsWeakenedAlertEnabled}, status_changed_alert_enabled = #{statusChangedAlertEnabled}, quiet_hours_enabled = #{quietHoursEnabled}, quiet_hours_start = #{quietHoursStart}, quiet_hours_end = #{quietHoursEnd}, timezone = #{timezone}, weekly_digest_day = #{weeklyDigestDay}, weekly_digest_time = #{weeklyDigestTime}, updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_device_tokens ( user_id, device_platform, device_identifier, fcm_token, app_version, push_enabled, is_active, last_seen_at, updated_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{devicePlatform}, #{deviceIdentifier}, #{fcmToken}, #{appVersion}, #{pushEnabled}, true, #{lastSeenAt}, now() ) on conflict (fcm_token) do update set user_id = excluded.user_id, device_platform = excluded.device_platform, device_identifier = excluded.device_identifier, app_version = excluded.app_version, push_enabled = excluded.push_enabled, is_active = true, last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at, updated_at = now(), deactivated_at = null
mapper.select: select id, user_id, device_platform, device_identifier, fcm_token, app_version, push_enabled, is_active, last_seen_at, created_at, updated_at, deactivated_at from user_device_tokens where user_id = #{userId} order by is_active desc, updated_at desc, id desc

select id, user_id, device_platform, device_identifier, fcm_token, app_version, push_enabled, is_active, last_seen_at, created_at, updated_at, deactivated_at from user_device_tokens where user_id = #{userId} and fcm_token = #{fcmToken} limit 1
mapper.update: update user_device_tokens set is_active = false, push_enabled = false, deactivated_at = #{deactivatedAt}, updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and fcm_token = #{fcmToken} and is_active = true
mapper.insert: insert into push_notification_deliveries ( alert_event_id, user_id, device_token_id, notification_kind, alert_type, dedupe_key, title, body, payload_json ) values ( #{alertEventId}, #{userId}, #{deviceTokenId}, #{notificationKind}, #{alertType}, #{dedupeKey}, #{title}, #{body}, #{payloadJson} ) on conflict (dedupe_key) do nothing

insert into weekly_notification_jobs ( user_id, report_id, report_week, scheduled_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{reportId}, #{reportWeek}, #{scheduledAt} ) on conflict (user_id, report_week) do update set report_id = excluded.report_id, job_status = 'PENDING', target_device_count = 0, success_count = 0, failure_count = 0, scheduled_at = excluded.scheduled_at, started_at = null, completed_at = null, error_message = null where weekly_notification_jobs.job_status in ('FAILED', 'SKIPPED')
